name: Well-Posedness
description: Hadamard: existence, uniqueness, continuous dependence. Cauchy–Kowalevski. Energy estimates. Lax–Milgram.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Well-posed\n exist, unique, cont dep"]
    D2["Def: Cauchy problem\ninit data on surface"]
    D3["Def: Ill-posed\nviolates Hadamard"]
    D4["Def: Energy estimate\n‖u‖ ≤ C‖data‖"]
    T1["Thm: Cauchy–Kowalevski\nanalytic ⇒ analytic soln"]
    T2["Thm: Hadamard ex\nLaplace Cauchy ill-posed"]
    T3["Thm: Energy est\nparab/hyp stability"]
    T4["Thm: Lax–Milgram\nelliptic in Hilbert"]
    T5["Thm: Semigroup\n evolution well-posed"]
    D1 --> T4
    D2 --> T1
    D3 --> T2
    D4 --> T3
    T3 --> D1
    T4 --> D1
    T5 --> D1
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
